description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style rifle with a boxy, utilitarian design and a predominantly matte black finish. The weapon features a short barrel with a threaded muzzle, a prominent detachable box magazine extending from the grip, and a folding wire stock at the rear for improved portability. The receiver is rectangular with minimal external embellishments, and the charging handle is located on the upper side. Iron sights are mounted on the top, with a simple front post and rear notch for aiming. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal, with some polymer or plastic components likely used for the grip and magazine.
description: A compact, matte black submachine gun-style rifle with a folding wire stock, detachable box magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel, front sight post, and the cylindrical muzzle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the folding wire stock, box magazine, and the rectangular receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wire stock and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ejection port, magazine, and folding stock.
